data_text_mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1C: Hello there, TRAINER!\nYou've got a wonderful smile, there.\pI have a hobby - collecting the profiles\nof POKéMON TRAINERS.
data_text_mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1D: So, how about it?\nMay I see your profile?

You make your own profile by putting
together four words or phrases.\pHere, I'll show you an example of a
profile using four pieces of text.\pYou can switch those four pieces with
other text pieces any which way you\llike to make your own profile.\pThere are a lot of text pieces that you
can use.\pThey are arranged in groups like
POKéMON, lifestyles, and hobbies so\lit is easier to look them up.\pSo, first, choose the group of text
pieces to display a list of choices.\pThen, pick the choice you want.\pRepeat for the remaining text choices,
and you'll have your very own profile.
data_text_mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1F: Yes! Thank you!\nMay I see your profile?
Oh, no, really?\pI imagine someone like you would have\na wonderful profile...
Oh? You're not into it right now?\pWell, anytime is good by me!
data_text_mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B20: Hello there, TRAINER!\nYou've got a wonderful smile.
May I see your new profile?
Yes! Thank you!\pI hope it's even better than the profile\nyou showed me before.
Oh, you like your profile the way it is.\pI don't blame you - it's a wonderful\nprofile the way it is now.
data_text_mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B21: F-fantastic!\pYour profile, it's wonderful!\nIt really says what you're about.\pWhy, anyone hearing this profile would\nbe captivated by you!\pThank you!
Oh?\nYou know the secret saying!\pThat means you're now a fellow member\nof the MYSTERY EVENT CLUB!
